ddls:
CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "dept_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "dept_code" TEXT /* Code for the department (e.g., MATH, CS) */,
  "dept_description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "dept_head" TEXT /* Name of the department head */,
  "dept_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the department */,
  "dept_email" TEXT /* Email address of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department offering the course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Code for the course (e.g., MATH 111, CS 101) */,
  "course_title" TEXT /* Title of the course */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Number of credit hours for the course */,
  "lecture_hours" INTEGER /* Number of lecture hours per week */,
  "lab_hours" INTEGER /* Number of lab hours per week */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "prerequisite_policy" TEXT /* Policy for prerequisites */,
  "co_requisite_policy" TEXT /* Policy for co-requisites */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prerequisites" (
  "prereq_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prerequisite */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course with the prerequisite */,
  "prereq_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prerequisite course */,
  "prereq_type" TEXT /* Type of prerequisite (e.g., required, recommended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prereq_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_prereq_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("prereq_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "co_requisites" (
  "co_requisite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each co-requisite */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course with the co-requisite */,
  "co_requisite_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the co-requisite course */,
  "co_requisite_type" TEXT /* Type of co-requisite (e.g., required, recommended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("co_requisite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_equivalencies" (
  "equiv_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course equivalency */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course that has an equivalency */,
  "equiv_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equivalent course */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution offering the equivalent course */,
  "equiv_type" TEXT /* Type of equivalency (e.g., direct, indirect) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equiv_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_equivalencies_equiv_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("equiv_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_equivalencies_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty_members" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty member */,
  "faculty_name" TEXT /* Name of the faculty member */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the faculty member belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the faculty member */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the faculty member */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the faculty member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_sections" (
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course section */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being offered */,
  "section_number" INTEGER /* Section number of the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester the course is being offered (e.g., Fall, Spring) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the course is being offered */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "max_enrollment" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed in the section */,
  "current_enrollment" INTEGER /* Current number of students enrolled in the section */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_sections_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_sections_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES faculty_members ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "minor" TEXT /* Minor of the student */,
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student's advisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_advisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("advisor_id") REFERENCES faculty_members ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the course */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course section the student is enrolled in */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade earned by the student in the course */,
  "attendance" TEXT /* Attendance record of the student in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES course_sections ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course history entry */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being updated */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the course update */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made to the course */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_history_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course evaluation */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being evaluated */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who made the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_comments" TEXT /* Comments made by the student during the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_evaluations_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_evaluations_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructor_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor evaluation */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor being evaluated */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who made the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_comments" TEXT /* Comments made by the student during the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructor_evaluations_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES faculty_members ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructor_evaluations_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
